el_nino.ecosystem: Marine food web collapse — warm SST suppresses cold upwelling, collapsing sardine/anchovy prey base
Tropical peat forest — El Niño drought elevates fire risk and peat combustion across Borneo/Sumatra
Amazonian floodplain — severe drought drops river levels, stranding floodplain-dependent species
East African savanna — reduced long rains dry watering holes and degrade forage quality
Coral reef — elevated SST compounds bleaching risk across Great Barrier Reef system

la_nina.ecosystem: Southern African savanna — La Niña drought stresses Zimbabwe/Zambia/Mozambique water sources
Philippine forests — La Niña enhances typhoon intensity and flooding in critical forest corridors
Queensland tropical rainforest — La Niña extreme rainfall and flooding in cassowary/koala habitat
Northern Amazon basin — La Niña intensifies wet season, causing extreme flooding of river systems
Mekong floodplain — La Niña intensifies monsoon flooding affecting Laos/Cambodia/Vietnam/Thailand
